---
title: "Assignment 3: Responsive Website"
date: "2026-02-19"
due: "2026-03-18"
---

## Overview

Create a fully responsive website that works perfectly on mobile, tablet, and desktop devices.

**Due Date**: March 18, 2026, 11:59 PM  
**Points**: 100

## Requirements

Build a multi-page responsive website using HTML5 and CSS3 with:

- Mobile-first approach
- Flexbox or CSS Grid layout
- Media queries for different screen sizes
- Responsive navigation menu
- Responsive images
- Touch-friendly interface

## Testing

Test your website on:
- Mobile (< 768px)
- Tablet (768px - 1024px)
- Desktop (> 1024px)

## Submission

**Due: March 18, 2026**
